payload.title: RUSTC_WRAPPER: multi-file crates break — module files loaded from original path, not temp dir
payload.description: When rustricted-rustc lowers lib.rs to a temp dir and rustc is invoked on the temp file, rustc looks for submodule files (mod foo;) relative to the temp dir. Since only lib.rs is copied, all mod declarations fail with E0583. Documented as a known limitation in rustricted-rustc/src/main.rs. Fix options: (a) copy all sibling .rs files to the temp dir, (b) add --remap-path-prefix for source dir so module resolution works, (c) document that multi-file crates should be single-file or use include!() for strict mode. Discovered during RT-12 heck case study (had to flatten 9-file crate into single lib.rs to make build work).
